headline: Agilent (A) Stock Looks Below Fair Value On Cash Flow
summary: Agilent Technologies stock presents a clear valuation split right now, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to meaningful upside while earnings-based market multiples imply the shares are already pricing in a lot of good news. Over the past 3 years, Agilent Technologies has returned 12.9%, which suggests the stock has rewarded patient holders but not in a way that obviously rules out further value questions. The recent launch of the AI powered xCELLigence RTCA...
